notes: Spain are near full strength with only Nico Williams (adductor) a minor doubt, though he is expected to be fit; De la Fuente hints at an unchanged XI. Belgium are without the injured Amadou Onana (confirmed ACL, tournament over) and Zeno Debast (leg injury, late fitness test), forcing a midfield reshuffle with De Bruyne's starting role still uncertain.
home_scorers: Mikel Oyarzabal (leading striker, tournament top scorer with 4 goals)
Lamine Yamal (right-wing creative threat, set-piece and chance creator)
Dani Olmo (attacking midfielder, high involvement in final third)
away_scorers: Charles De Ketelaere (false nine starter, 2 goals vs USA, in-form)
Kevin De Bruyne (playmaker, on penalties, possible starter vs Spain)
Leandro Trossard (left-wing attacker, consistent in tournament)
